plugins.name: 3gpp-reader
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze 3GPP specs from ETSI to extract protocol header formats, field definitions, and bit layouts

plugins.name: rfc-reader
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze RFC documents to extract protocol header formats, field definitions, and bit layouts

plugins.name: copilot
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to GitHub Copilot CLI as a sub-agent

plugins.name: kernel-patch-review
plugins.description: Review Linux kernel patches against submitting-patches and coding-style guidelines using parallel sub-agents
